controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative
Banks - Undertaking of Financial Services) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (rural co-operative banks - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: 1These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rcbs' and individually as 'an rcb')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Rural Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'RCBs' and individually as 'an RCB').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to rural co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rcbs' and individually as 'an rcb')

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean state co-operative banks and central co-operative banks, as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act, 1981
controls.control_description:
In this context, rural co-operative banks shall mean State Co-operative Banks
and Central Co-operative Banks, as defined in the National Bank for Agriculture
and Rural Development Act, 1981.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean state co-operative banks and central co-operative banks, as defined in the national bank for agriculture and rural development act, 1981

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'debtor company' means any company to which an rcb currently has or previously had a loan or investment
controls.control_description:
In these directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Debtor company' means any company to which an RCB currently has or
previously had a loan or investment exposure (excluding equity instruments)
anytime during the preceding twelve months;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'debtor company' means any company to which an rcb currently has or previously had a loan or investment

controls.control_objective: To ensure equity shares, compulsorily convertible preference shares (ccps) and compulsorily convertible debentures (ccd)
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Equity instrument' means equity shares, compulsorily convertible
preference shares (CCPS) and compulsorily convertible debentures (CCD);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to equity shares, compulsorily convertible preference shares (ccps) and compulsorily convertible debentures (ccd)

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company engaged in the 'business of financial services'
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Financial Services Company' means a company engaged in the 'business
of financial services'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company engaged in the 'business of financial services'

controls.control_objective: To ensure include - 1 modified w
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The 'business of financial services' shall include -
1 Modified w.e.f.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include - 1 modified w

controls.control_objective: To ensure : (1) evaluate and approve any proposal to enter into a long-term agreement for undertaking insurance business on a referral basis, upon completion of
controls.control_description:
The Board of an RCB shall:
(1) evaluate and approve any proposal to enter into a long-term agreement for
undertaking insurance business on a referral basis, upon completion of the
initial contract period,
(2) approve implementation of customer grievance redressal mechanism for
merchant acquisition business,
(3) approve a policy on merchant acquisition for card transactions,
(4) evaluate and approve a resolution for undertaking insurance business as
a corporate agent without risk participation,
(5) evaluate and approve resolution for undertaking the business of Pre-paid
Payment Instruments (PPIs).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to : (1) evaluate and approve any proposal to enter into a long-term agreement for undertaking insurance business on a referral basis, upon completion of

controls.control_objective: To ensure have satisfactorily implemented a comprehensive board approved policy on customer grievance redressal mechanism which includes escalation matrix for r
controls.control_description:
Further, it shall have satisfactorily
implemented a comprehensive Board approved policy on Customer
grievance redressal mechanism which includes escalation matrix for
resolution of customer complaints.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have satisfactorily implemented a comprehensive board approved policy on customer grievance redressal mechanism which includes escalation matrix for r

controls.control_objective: To ensure have suitable provisions governing its investments in an aif scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations
controls.control_description:
An RCB's investment policy shall have suitable provisions governing its
investments in an AIF Scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have suitable provisions governing its investments in an aif scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure individually contribute more than 10 percent of the corpus of an aif scheme
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall not individually contribute more than 10 percent of the corpus of
an AIF Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to individually contribute more than 10 percent of the corpus of an aif scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme
controls.control_description:
The aggregate contribution by all Regulated Entities (REs) in any AIF Scheme
shall not be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean: (1) commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks)
controls.control_description:
In this context, 'RE' shall mean:
(1) Commercial Banks (including Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean: (1) commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to make 100 percent provision to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company through the aif scheme
controls.control_description:
Where an RCB contributes more than five percent of the corpus of an AIF
Scheme that has downstream investment (excluding equity instruments) in a
debtor company of the RCB, the RCB shall be required to make 100 percent
provision to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company
through the AIF Scheme, subject to a cap equivalent to RCB's direct loan and /
or investment exposure to the said debtor company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to make 100 percent provision to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company through the aif scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure deduct the entire investment from its capital funds - proportionately from both tier-1 and tier-2 capital (wherever applicable)
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding the provisions of paragraph 10, where an RCB's contribution is
in the form of subordinated units, it shall deduct the entire investment from its
capital funds - proportionately from both Tier-1 and Tier-2 capital (wherever
applicable).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deduct the entire investment from its capital funds - proportionately from both tier-1 and tier-2 capital (wherever applicable)

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in consultation with the government of india, by way of a notification, exempt certain aifs (annex i) from these directions on aif contained in part b of chapter ii
controls.control_description:
2The RBI may, in consultation with the Government of India, by way of a
notification, exempt certain AIFs (Annex I) from these Directions on AIF
contained in Part B of Chapter II, except for paragraph 7.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in consultation with the government of india, by way of a notification, exempt certain aifs (annex i) from these directions on aif contained in part b of chapter ii

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to undertake insurance business as corporate agent without risk participation
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall be permitted to undertake insurance business as corporate agent
without risk participation, subject to it fulfilling the following terms and conditions:
(1) An RCB shall be a Scheduled or licensed State Co-operative Bank (SCB)
or a licensed District Central Co-operative Bank (DCCB);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to undertake insurance business as corporate agent without risk participation

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a minimum positive net worth [real or exchangeable value of paid-up capital and reserves as defined in section 11 of the banking regulation act
controls.control_description:
(2) An RCB shall have a minimum positive net worth [real or exchangeable
value of paid-up capital and reserves as defined in Section 11 of the
Banking Regulation Act, 1949(AACS)] of ₹50 crore as per the latest
NABARD Inspection Report;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a minimum positive net worth [real or exchangeable value of paid-up capital and reserves as defined in section 11 of the banking regulation act

controls.control_objective: To ensure have any accumulated losses
controls.control_description:
(3) An RCB shall have earned net profit for the last three years and shall not
have any accumulated losses;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have any accumulated losses

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 10 percent
controls.control_description: (4) The Gross NPA of the RCB shall not exceed 10 percent;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 10 percent

controls.control_objective: To ensure have violated prudential norms including individual and group exposure norms
controls.control_description:
(5) An RCB shall not have violated prudential norms including individual and
group exposure norms;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have violated prudential norms including individual and group exposure norms

controls.control_objective: To ensure have complied with the guidelines on loans and advances to directors, their relatives and associated firms
controls.control_description:
(6) An RCB shall have complied with the guidelines on loans and advances to
directors, their relatives and associated firms;
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have complied with the guidelines on loans and advances to directors, their relatives and associated firms

controls.control_objective: To ensure be opened with the rcb and premium collected shall be directly paid to the insurance companies
controls.control_description:
(7) Premium collection accounts shall not be opened with the RCB and
premium collected shall be directly paid to the insurance companies;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be opened with the rcb and premium collected shall be directly paid to the insurance companies

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to irdai regulations prescribed for corporate agents
controls.control_description: (8) An RCB shall adhere to IRDAI regulations prescribed for corporate agents;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to irdai regulations prescribed for corporate agents

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit an undertaking to the effect that banking business will not in any way get contaminated/affected on account of acting as agent of insurance com
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit an undertaking to the effect that banking business will not in any way get contaminated/affected on account of acting as agent of insurance com

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt any restrictive practice of compelling customers to opt for a specific insurance company, particularly in respect of assets financed by the rcb
controls.control_description:
and
(10) An RCB shall not adopt any restrictive practice of compelling customers to
opt for a specific insurance company, particularly in respect of assets
financed by the RCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt any restrictive practice of compelling customers to opt for a specific insurance company, particularly in respect of assets financed by the rcb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be free to exercise their own choice of insurer
controls.control_description:
Customers shall be free to exercise their own choice
of insurer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be free to exercise their own choice of insurer

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply through pravaah portal (https://pravaah
controls.control_description:
An RCB fulfilling the above conditions and desirous of undertaking insurance
business as corporate agent without risk participation, shall apply through
Pravaah Portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to Department of Regulation, RBI with
requisite information and documents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply through pravaah portal (https://pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accompanied by: (1) a certified copy of the board resolution approving the proposal
controls.control_description:
The application shall be accompanied by:
(1) A certified copy of the Board Resolution approving the proposal;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accompanied by: (1) a certified copy of the board resolution approving the proposal

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake insurance business without obtaining prior permission of the rbi
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall not undertake insurance business without obtaining prior
permission of the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake insurance business without obtaining prior permission of the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to their obtaining necessary authorisation/ license from irdai
controls.control_description:
The permission granted to RCB to undertake insurance business on non-risk
participation basis shall be subject to their obtaining necessary authorisation/
license from IRDAI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to their obtaining necessary authorisation/ license from irdai

controls.control_objective: To ensure be construed as a permission to adjust the dues of the insured from out of the proceeds of insurance claims
controls.control_description:
The said permission shall not be construed as a permission to adjust the dues
of the insured from out of the proceeds of insurance claims.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be construed as a permission to adjust the dues of the insured from out of the proceeds of insurance claims

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed strictly under a tri-party agreement among the insured, the insurer, and the insurance agent
controls.control_description:
Any adjustment of dues from insurance claims shall be governed strictly under
a tri-party agreement among the insured, the insurer, and the insurance agent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed strictly under a tri-party agreement among the insured, the insurer, and the insurance agent

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valid for a period of two years
controls.control_description:
The permission granted to an RCB for undertaking insurance agency business
shall be valid for a period of two years, subject to review prior to its expiry.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valid for a period of two years

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain renewal of permission by applying through pravaah portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to department of regulation, rbi
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall obtain renewal of permission by applying through Pravaah Portal
(https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to Department of Regulation, RBI, provided the RCB
continues to comply with the stipulated terms and conditions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain renewal of permission by applying through pravaah portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to department of regulation, rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be liable to be withdrawn
controls.control_description:
In case of non-compliance with any of the conditions at any time after the grant
of permission, such permission shall be liable to be withdrawn.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be liable to be withdrawn

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide physical infrastructure within its branch premises to insurance companies for selling insurance products to the rcb's customers with adequate
controls.control_description:
Conditions for Undertaking Referral Business: Under the referral arrangement,
an RCB shall provide physical infrastructure within its branch premises to
insurance companies for selling insurance products to the RCB's customers with
adequate disclosure and transparency, and in turn earn referral fees on the basis
of premia collected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide physical infrastructure within its branch premises to insurance companies for selling insurance products to the rcb's customers with adequate

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following conditions: (1) an rcb shall comply with the relevant irdai regulations applicable to referral arrangements with insurance
controls.control_description:
The above permission shall be subject to the following
conditions:
(1) An RCB shall comply with the relevant IRDAI regulations applicable to
referral arrangements with insurance companies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following conditions: (1) an rcb shall comply with the relevant irdai regulations applicable to referral arrangements with insurance

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt any restrictive practice of compelling customers to opt for a specific insurance company, particularly in respect of assets financed by the rcb
controls.control_description:
(2) An RCB shall not adopt any restrictive practice of compelling customers to
opt for a specific insurance company, particularly in respect of assets
financed by the RCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt any restrictive practice of compelling customers to opt for a specific insurance company, particularly in respect of assets financed by the rcb

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into a formal agreement with the concerned insurance company to permit use of the rcb's premises, and allow use of existing infrastructure
controls.control_description:
(3) An RCB desirous of entering into referral arrangement, in addition to
complying with IRDAI regulations, shall enter into a formal agreement with
the concerned insurance company to permit use of the RCB's premises,
and allow use of existing infrastructure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into a formal agreement with the concerned insurance company to permit use of the rcb's premises, and allow use of existing infrastructure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be for a period not exceeding three (3) years, with the rcb retaining discretion to renegotiate the terms based on service performance, or enter into
controls.control_description:
(4) The initial agreement shall be for a period not exceeding three (3) years,
with the RCB retaining discretion to renegotiate the terms based on service
performance, or enter into a new agreement after the initial period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be for a period not exceeding three (3) years, with the rcb retaining discretion to renegotiate the terms based on service performance, or enter into

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into a longer-term contract subject to board approval
controls.control_description:
(5) Upon completion of the initial period, an RCB may enter into a longer-term
contract subject to Board approval.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into a longer-term contract subject to board approval

controls.control_objective: To ensure be purely voluntary
controls.control_description:
(6) Participation of customers of an RCB in insurance products shall be purely
voluntary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be purely voluntary

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly stated in all publicity material issued by the rcb
controls.control_description:
This must be clearly stated in all publicity material issued by the
RCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly stated in all publicity material issued by the rcb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no direct or indirect linkage between the provision of banking services and the availing of insurance products
controls.control_description:
There shall be no direct or indirect linkage between the provision of
banking services and the availing of insurance products.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no direct or indirect linkage between the provision of banking services and the availing of insurance products

controls.control_objective: To ensure be transferred to the business of the rcb
controls.control_description:
(7) Any risk associated with the referral arrangement shall not be transferred
to the business of the RCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be transferred to the business of the rcb

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior approval of the rbi to undertake referral business
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall not require prior approval of the RBI to undertake referral
business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior approval of the rbi to undertake referral business

controls.control_objective: To ensure be licensed by the rbi and cbs compliant
controls.control_description:
An RCB not intending to act as Point of Sale (POS) acquiring bank is permitted
to deploy third party POS terminals without prior approval of RBI subject to
fulfilling the following criteria:
(1) An RCB shall be licensed by the RBI and CBS compliant;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be licensed by the rbi and cbs compliant

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than nine percent in the preceding financial year
controls.control_description:
(2) The CRAR shall not be less than nine percent in the preceding financial
year;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than nine percent in the preceding financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure have made a net profit in the preceding financial year
controls.control_description: (3) An RCB shall have made a net profit in the preceding financial year;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have made a net profit in the preceding financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure consist of at least two professional directors
controls.control_description: (4) The Board of RCB shall consist of at least two professional directors;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consist of at least two professional directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a board approved customer grievance redressal mechanism
controls.control_description:
(5) An RCB shall have a Board approved customer grievance redressal
mechanism;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a board approved customer grievance redressal mechanism

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place policy approved by the board for merchant acquisition for card transactions
controls.control_description:
(6) An RCB shall put in place policy approved by the Board for merchant
acquisition for card transactions;
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place policy approved by the board for merchant acquisition for card transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be any restrictions imposed on the rcb for accepting deposits/withdrawals by the rbi
controls.control_description:
(7) There shall not be any restrictions imposed on the RCB for accepting
deposits/withdrawals by the RBI;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be any restrictions imposed on the rcb for accepting deposits/withdrawals by the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain consent from its merchant customers before offering third party pos terminals and shall disclose the settlement process
controls.control_description:
(8) An RCB shall obtain consent from its merchant customers before offering
third party POS terminals and shall disclose the settlement process;
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to obtain consent from its merchant customers before offering third party pos terminals and shall disclose the settlement process

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the operationalization of third-party pos terminals to the respective regional office of rbi within a month, along with the necessary documents
controls.control_description:
(9) An RCB shall report the operationalization of third-party POS terminals to
the respective Regional Office of RBI within a month, along with the
necessary documents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the operationalization of third-party pos terminals to the respective regional office of rbi within a month, along with the necessary documents

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to deploy its own pos terminals with prior approval of rbi subject to the rcb fulfilling the following criteria: (1) an rcb shall comply
controls.control_description:
An RCB intending to act as POS acquiring bank shall be permitted to deploy its
own POS terminals with prior approval of RBI subject to the RCB fulfilling the
following criteria:
(1) An RCB shall comply with criteria mentioned in clauses (1) to (7) of
paragraph 28 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to deploy its own pos terminals with prior approval of rbi subject to the rcb fulfilling the following criteria: (1) an rcb shall comply

controls.control_objective: To ensure have been subjected to an is audit not earlier than six months from the date of application, certifying that the systems are adequately secure
controls.control_description:
<image>
(2) The RCB's IT systems and CBS shall have been subjected to an IS Audit
not earlier than six months from the date of application, certifying that the
systems are adequately secure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have been subjected to an is audit not earlier than six months from the date of application, certifying that the systems are adequately secure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than ₹25 crore as per the last supervisory inspection
controls.control_description:
(3) The assessed net-worth of the RCB shall be more than ₹25 crore as per
the last supervisory inspection;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than ₹25 crore as per the last supervisory inspection

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than seven percent and net npas shall be less than 3 percent in the preceding financial year
controls.control_description:
(4) The Gross NPA of the RCB shall be less than seven percent and net NPAs
shall be less than 3 percent in the preceding financial year;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than seven percent and net npas shall be less than 3 percent in the preceding financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure have been subjected to monetary penalty during the last two financial years and in the year of application
controls.control_description:
(5) An RCB shall not have been subjected to monetary penalty during the last
two financial years and in the year of application;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have been subjected to monetary penalty during the last two financial years and in the year of application

controls.control_objective: To ensure be any default in the maintenance of crr/slr during the preceding financial year
controls.control_description:
(6) There shall not be any default in the maintenance of CRR/SLR during the
preceding financial year;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be any default in the maintenance of crr/slr during the preceding financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a member of authorized card network, such as rupay, visa, or mastercard, etc
controls.control_description:
(7) An RCB shall be a member of authorized card network, such as RuPay,
Visa, or MasterCard, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a member of authorized card network, such as rupay, visa, or mastercard, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with instructions and guidelines on merchant acquisition for card transactions and pos issued by department of payment and settlement systems
controls.control_description:
An RCB shall comply with instructions and guidelines on Merchant Acquisition
for card transactions and POS issued by Department of Payment and Settlement
Systems, RBI from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to comply with instructions and guidelines on merchant acquisition for card transactions and pos issued by department of payment and settlement systems

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply through pravaah portal (https://pravaah
controls.control_description:
An RCB desirous to deploy their own POS terminals and act as POS acquiring
bank shall apply through Pravaah Portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to
Department of Regulation, RBI, for necessary permission, with the requisite
information and documents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply through pravaah portal (https://pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure have its own atm network and there should be no restrictions on acceptance or repayment of deposits
controls.control_description:
A licensed RCB desirous of issuing Prepaid Payment Instruments (PPIs) shall
have its own ATM network and there should be no restrictions on acceptance or
repayment of deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have its own atm network and there should be no restrictions on acceptance or repayment of deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to compliance with eligibility criteria and other guidelines as prescribed by department of payment and settlement systems (dpss), rbi from
controls.control_description:
Further, issuance of Prepaid Payment Instruments, shall
be subject to compliance with eligibility criteria and other guidelines as
prescribed by Department of Payment and Settlement Systems (DPSS), RBI
from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be subject to compliance with eligibility criteria and other guidelines as prescribed by department of payment and settlement systems (dpss), rbi from

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to issue ppis
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to issue ppis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than 10 percent in the current and preceding financial year
controls.control_description:
(2) CRAR shall not be less than 10 percent in the current and preceding
financial year;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than 10 percent in the current and preceding financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than three percent in the current and preceding financial year
controls.control_description:
(3) Gross NPAs shall be less than seven percent and net NPA shall not be
more than three percent in the current and preceding financial year;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than three percent in the current and preceding financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than ₹25 crore as per the last supervisory inspection
controls.control_description:
(4) Assessed net-worth shall be more than ₹25 crore as per the last
supervisory inspection;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than ₹25 crore as per the last supervisory inspection

controls.control_objective: To ensure have defaulted in the maintenance of crr/slr during the current and preceding financial year
controls.control_description:
(5) An RCB shall not have defaulted in the maintenance of CRR/SLR during
the current and preceding financial year;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have defaulted in the maintenance of crr/slr during the current and preceding financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure have made a net profit in the preceding financial year
controls.control_description: (6) An RCB shall have made a net profit in the preceding financial year;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have made a net profit in the preceding financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure have at least two professional directors on its board and shall have following systems and control in place:
controls.control_description:
(7) An RCB shall have at least two professional directors on its Board and
shall have following systems and control in place:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have at least two professional directors on its board and shall have following systems and control in place:

controls.control_objective: To ensure have been subjected to monetary penalty during last two financial years and in the year of application
controls.control_description:
(9) An RCB shall not have been subjected to monetary penalty during last two
financial years and in the year of application;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have been subjected to monetary penalty during last two financial years and in the year of application

controls.control_objective: To ensure have satisfactorily implemented a comprehensive board approved policy on customer grievance redressal mechanism which includes escalation matrix for r
controls.control_description:
(10) An RCB shall have satisfactorily implemented a comprehensive Board
approved policy on Customer grievance redressal mechanism which
includes escalation matrix for resolution of customer complaints.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have satisfactorily implemented a comprehensive board approved policy on customer grievance redressal mechanism which includes escalation matrix for r

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be guided by the instructions issued in this regard by dpss, rbi from time to time
controls.control_description:
The issuance and operation of prepaid instruments shall also be guided by the
instructions issued in this regard by DPSS, RBI from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be guided by the instructions issued in this regard by dpss, rbi from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
